description: Perform a compliance audit on NYC restaurant inspections in WPS Spreadsheet using ~/Documents/nyc_inspections_audit.xlsx. On the 'Violations_Log' sheet, populate 'Base Fine' (Col G) using a VLOOKUP against 'Fine_Master' and calculate 'Adjusted Fine' (Col H) by applying a 1.5x multiplier to the Base Fine if the CriticalFlag is 'Y'. On the 'Inspection_Rollup' sheet, calculate 'Total Points' (Col D) and 'Total Fines' (Col E, Currency format) by summing values matching CAMIS and InspectionDate. Determine the 'Projected Grade' (Col F) based on points (0-13='A', 14-27='B', >=28='C') and assign an 'Audit Action' (Col G) of 'Urgent Review' if the Grade is 'C' or Total Fines exceed 500, otherwise 'Routine'. Save the updated file to ~/Documents/nyc_inspections_audit.xlsx.
